race.comment: BELLERATA (4) resumes from a lengthy break and expected to go close with the claim. Thrown in the deep end when outclassed to finish seventh over 1200m at Gosford in a Super Maiden last December.  Pacifiers come off and will take catching form the draw. MANDERLEY EXPRESS (12) is a well bred Home Affairs colt from the stakes-winner Mrs Danvers on debut for the Cavanough stable. Trialled okay and the blinkers go on from the good gate. LIFE IS A SHIRAZ (1) deep into the prep and will relish a firmer surface today. Stalked the speed and held on well to finish fifth over 1100m at Dubbo. Senior rider hops aboard and can push forward from the gate. Each way. RUSSIAN WORDS (8) pacifiers come off and will find this more to her liking after having mixed luck at provincial level. Can push forward and take a hand in the finish.
